mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsExcclcDao.select */ select bsns_excclc_id , bsns_cnvn_id , task_reqst_wct_id , excut_sbsidy , excut_bsnm_alotm , excut_cnvn_totamt , attachment_group_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_excclc where bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} and task_reqst_wct_id = #{taskReqstWctId}
